ddls:
CREATE TABLE "numerical_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method (e.g., TSGLEEi1) */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference for the method (e.g., BE1) */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of the method (IM or EX) */,
  "formulation" TEXT /* Formulation of the method (e.g., (1,3,2)) */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Gamma value of the method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the method */,
  "variants" TEXT /* Variants of the method */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Specific parameters of the method */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the method is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_numerical_methods_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_numerical_methods_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method associated with this performance */,
  "performance_notes" TEXT /* Notes about this performance */,
  "performance_form" TEXT /* Form of this performance (e.g., (yvarepsilon)) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was measured */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Additional performance metrics */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the performance entry is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES numerical_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access event */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the log entry is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES numerical_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
